title: Circus Of Sound
description: For Four Thursdays in May, Circus of Sound is coming to East Brighton. Enjoy live performances and cool vibes in The Skep, a brand new fringe venue for Brighton. “Everyone is welcome, everyone is included.” The event format will be different every week, bringing together established and emerging performers, as follows... 7th May - live music, featuring local bands including Thrillhouse 14th May - a premiere performance of one-man play 'Bad Indian', written and performed by Saaj Raja 21st May - Writer's Block Brighton, poetry and spoken word hosted by Woodzy 28th May - a VICE VERSA event of conversation and creativity, with our Culture Shift patron Michael Attenborough

venue.name: The Skep
venue.address: East Brighton Trust, Manor House, Mouslecoomb Place, Lewes Road, East Sussex
